title: Oxydectes reflexifolia
taxonomy: Oxydectes reflexifolia is classified within the family Bromeliaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the pineapple family. This family includes over 3,000 species and is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. Oxydectes reflexifolia is a type of bromeliad, which is a specific type of flowering plant characterized by its rosette of leaves and ability to store water in its leaves. The genus Oxydectes is a relatively small and understudied group within the Bromeliaceae family, containing several species of flowering plants found primarily in South America. Overall, the classification of Oxydectes reflexifolia reflects its unique characteristics and its relationship to other plants within the Bromeliaceae family.
